visual_summary: A Number Ticker is a countdown or count-up UI component that displays numbers in real-time. It is often used to showcase progress, completion percentages, or real-time data updates. Developers would use this component to visualize dynamic information.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: Number Ticker
Description: A Number Ticker is a countdown or count-up UI component that displays numbers in real-time. It is often used to showcase progress, completion percentages, or real-time data updates. Developers would use this component to visualize dynamic information.
Style: dark-mode, responsive
Interactions: hover, clickable, animates
Tags: countdown, countup, animated, real-time

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

  startValue?: number
  direction?: "up" | "down"
  delay?: number
  decimalPlaces?: number
}
